description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker with a tan leather upper and dark blue accents, including the laces, inner lining, heel tab, and the prominent Nike Swoosh logo on both sides. The shoe features a perforated toe box for breathability and a thick, white midsole with a visible air unit in the heel for cushioning. The outsole is a light brown gum color, showing signs of wear and dirt, especially around the edges. The heel tab displays the 'NIKE AIR' branding in gold, while the tongue also features a stitched Nike logo. The overall structure is robust, with reinforced stitching along the panels and a padded collar for comfort. The shoe appears to be well-used, with visible creasing and discoloration on the leather and midsole.
description: A tan and blue Nike low-top sneaker with a visible air unit, perforated toe box, and signs of wear. Features prominent Nike branding and a thick, cushioned sole.
description_view_0: Front view shows the perforated tan toe box, dark blue laces, and the tongue with a visible Nike logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large dark blue Nike Swoosh, air unit in the heel, and overall profile of the shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel tab with 'NIKE AIR' branding and the layered construction of the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the Swoosh, air unit, and the worn condition of the leather and sole.
attribute_logo: Nike Swoosh on both sides in dark blue, 'NIKE AIR' in gold on heel tab, Nike logo on tongue in gold
